# claudeplatform_organization_invite (Resource)

An invitation to join the organization. Invites expire server-side after 21 days; an expired or accepted invite is not recreated automatically (status is tracked as an attribute).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeplatform_organization_invite" "bob" {
  email = "bob@example.com"
  role  = "developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address to invite.
- `role` (String) Organization role granted on acceptance.

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `invited_at` (String)
- `status` (String) Invite status (e.g. pending, accepted, expired).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using the invite ID.
terraform import claudeplatform_organization_invite.bob invite_01XyZAbcd789
```
